creator: rmiya@cc.hirosaki-u.ac.jp
text:
Hello Mark, 

In <20010613010742.A4936@hamster.kyne.com.au>, 
mark@kyne.com.au wrote: 

Mark>>If this continues (and I see no reason why it won't) this port is just
Mark>>going to break again ;(.

I (strongly) think so, too.

Is it possible that
  * checksum error will be ignored by NO_CHECKSUM=yes in Makefile, or
  * messages to users say 
      ``Use NO_CHECKSUM=yes, if only at the checksum error.'' 

-----
Ryo MIYAMOTO; rmiya@cc.hirosaki-u.ac.jp;
